name: Acorn Squash with Wehani Rice & Pecan Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Wehani rice or rice blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cut the acorn squash in half and remove any seeds or strings.
3. Place the squash halves cut-side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Cook for about 45 minutes or until tender, then turn off the heat and let cool slightly.
5. In a large bowl, cook the Wehani rice according to package instructions using water and tamari.
6. Once cooked, fluff the rice with a fork and set aside.
7. In a separate pan, melt soy margarine over medium heat.
8. Add diced carrots, celery, and onion to the pan; sauté until vegetables are softened.
9. Stir in dried thyme, fresh ginger, pecan pieces, and orange zest.
10. Mix well with cooked rice, season with sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
11. Spoon stuffing into each acorn squash half.
12. Return the squash to the oven for an additional 15 minutes or until heated through.
